sheets.name: Cash and Bank journal
sheets.query:
SELECT account_journal.name ->> 'en_US' AS account_journal_name, SUM(ROUND(account_move.amount_untaxed_signed / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2)) AS account_move_amount_untaxed_signed_sum, SUM(ROUND(account_move.amount_tax_signed / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2)) AS account_move_amount_tax_signed_sum, SUM(ROUND(account_move.amount_total_signed / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2)) AS account_move_amount_total_signed_sum FROM account_journal JOIN account_move ON account_journal.id = account_move.journal_id WHERE account_journal.type IN ('cash', 'bank') GROUP BY account_journal_name ORDER BY account_journal_name LIMIT 30

table_ids.linked: Linked by Journal.id on Journal Entry.journal_id

SUM(ROUND(account_move.amount_untaxed_signed / COALESCE((

                        ), 1) * COALESCE((

                            AND company_id = 1

                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2)) AS account_move_amount_untaxed_signed_sum

SUM(ROUND(account_move.amount_tax_signed / COALESCE((

                            WHERE currency_id = account_move.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1

                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2)) AS account_move_amount_tax_signed_sum

SUM(ROUND(account_move.amount_total_signed / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2)) AS account_move_amount_total_signed_sum

sheets.name: journals
sheets.query:
SELECT account_journal.name ->> 'en_US' AS account_journal_name, SUM(ROUND(account_move_line.debit / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move_line.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2)) AS account_move_line_debit_sum FROM account_journal JOIN account_move_line ON account_journal.id = account_move_line.journal_id WHERE account_move_line.parent_state = 'posted' GROUP BY account_journal_name ORDER BY account_journal_name LIMIT 30

table_ids.linked: Linked by Journal.id on Account Move Line.journal_id

axis_ids.query: account_journal.name ->> 'en_US' AS account_journal_name

SUM(ROUND(account_move_line.debit / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move_line.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2)) AS account_move_line_debit_sum

sheets.name: Chart of Accounts
sheets.query:
SELECT account_account.name ->> 'en_US' AS account_account_name, SUM(ROUND(account_move_line.debit / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move_line.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2)) AS account_move_line_debit_sum, SUM(ROUND(account_move_line.credit / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move_line.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2)) AS account_move_line_credit_sum FROM account_account JOIN account_move_line ON account_account.id = account_move_line.account_id GROUP BY account_account.account_type, account_account_name ORDER BY account_account.account_type LIMIT 30

account_account.account_type AS account_account_account_type

sheets.name: Payment
sheets.query:
SELECT account_payment.partner_type AS account_payment_partner_type, SUM(ROUND(account_payment.amount / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_payment.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2)) AS account_payment_amount_sum FROM account_payment GROUP BY account_payment_partner_type ORDER BY account_payment_partner_type LIMIT 30

axis_ids.query: account_payment.partner_type AS account_payment_partner_type

SUM(ROUND(account_payment.amount / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_payment.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2)) AS account_payment_amount_sum

sheets.name: Profit and loss
sheets.query:
SELECT account_account.account_type AS account_account_account_type, SUM(ROUND(account_move_line.debit / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move_line.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2)) AS account_move_line_debit_sum, SUM(ROUND(account_move_line.credit / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move_line.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2)) AS account_move_line_credit_sum FROM account_account JOIN account_move_line ON account_account.id = account_move_line.account_id WHERE account_account.account_type IN ('income', 'income_other', 'expense', 'expense_depreciation', 'expense_direct_cost') GROUP BY account_account_account_type ORDER BY account_account_account_type LIMIT 30

sheets.name: Posted Entries
sheets.query:
SELECT ROUND(account_move_line.credit / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move_line.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2) AS account_move_line_credit FROM account_move_line WHERE account_move_line.parent_state = 'posted'

sheets.name: Invoice
sheets.query:
SELECT ROUND(account_move.amount_residual / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2) AS account_move_amount_residual FROM account_move WHERE account_move.move_type = 'out_invoice'

axis_ids.query:
ROUND(account_move.amount_residual / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2) AS account_move_amount_residual

sheets.name: Draft entries
sheets.query:
SELECT account_move.ref AS account_move_ref, ROUND(account_move.amount_untaxed / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2) AS account_move_amount_untaxed, ROUND(account_move.amount_residual / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2) AS account_move_amount_residual, account_move.id AS account_move_id, account_move.total_residual AS account_move_total_residual, ROUND(account_move.quick_edit_total_amount / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2) AS account_move_quick_edit_total_amount FROM account_move WHERE account_move.state = 'draft' GROUP BY account_move_ref, account_move_id, account_move_total_residual ORDER BY account_move_ref

axis_ids.query: account_move.ref AS account_move_ref

ROUND(account_move.amount_untaxed / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2) AS account_move_amount_untaxed

ROUND(account_move.amount_residual / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2) AS account_move_amount_residual
account_move.id AS account_move_id
account_move.total_residual AS account_move_total_residual

ROUND(account_move.quick_edit_total_amount / COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = account_move.currency_id
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1) * COALESCE((
                            SELECT rate
                            FROM res_currency_rate
                            WHERE currency_id = 1
                            AND company_id = 1
                            ORDER BY name DESC
                            LIMIT 1
                        ), 1), 2) AS account_move_quick_edit_total_amount
